title: Grilled Fish Skewers with Portuguese Seasoning
description: A flavorful and healthy dish made with grilled fish, infused with the rich flavors of Portuguese seasoning. Perfect for a summer evening.

ingredients.name: Fish (any white fish works well, cut into 1-inch pieces)
ingredients.notes: Make sure to pat the fish dry before grilling

ingredients.name: Portuguese seasoning
ingredients.notes: You can adjust the amount to your taste

ingredients.name: Monsoon salt
ingredients.notes: Add a pinch of salt to bring out the flavors

instructions: 1. Preheat a grill to medium-high heat.
2. Thread the fish pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the Portuguese seasoning and monsoon salt.
4. Brush the grill with dense olive oil to prevent sticking.
5. Grill the fish skewers for 8-10 minutes, flipping halfway through.
6. While the fish is cooking, mix together the remaining Portuguese seasoning and monsoon salt in a small bowl.
7. Once the fish is cooked through, brush it with the seasoned mixture.
8. Serve the fish skewers hot with lemon wedges on the side.
